current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Bit-Pair XOR Sum Parity
current_run.description: Given an N-bit secret integer s, the oracle computes f(x) = ((x & (x >> 1)) ^ ((x >> 1) & (x >> 2))) & s_bit_parity where s_bit_parity is the parity of the set bits in the secret s. The goal is to find s. This problem involves non-linear operations (bitwise AND and XOR) on shifted versions of the input x, combined with a parity check dependent on the secret's popcount. It is designed to be distinct from linear and standard quadratic problems.
